_doc: STALLED (no-byte-progress) snapshot: still in-progress per its state, but bytesTransferred has not advanced across polls. The stall watch declares death only when bytesTransferred is unchanged for acq_stall_seconds (D-01), then cancels (remove=true) and falls to the next candidate (D-02). [ASSUMED] in-progress state string pending the 04-05 live probe (A3) — reference via a named constant (e.g. STATE_IN_PROGRESS).
